name: twin
description: Harvest your agent sessions across every harness on this machine and distill a portable operating-profile (AGENTS.md) — then keep it alive: update incrementally, audit it against its evidence, query it mid-task. Pure-markdown playbooks; the harness is the LLM, so no API key is needed.

interface.shortDescription: Build a portable operating-profile from your agent sessions
interface.longDescription: Twin harvests your AI-agent sessions across every harness on this machine, distills how you operate into cited, context-dependent facts, and synthesizes one portable AGENTS.md operating-profile your agents can load. Four playbooks keep it alive: profile (full build), update (incremental refresh), audit (grade every claim against its evidence), query (ask 'how do I usually handle X?' with citations). Local-only, secrets scrubbed, and the harness is the LLM so no API key is needed.
defaultPrompt: Build my operating profile from my agent sessions
Update my operating profile with my recent sessions
Audit my operating profile against its evidence
